title: festuca arundinacea subsp. orientalis
intro: Festuca arundinacea subsp. orientalis, also known as tall fescue or oriental fescue, is a subspecies of the Festuca arundinacea plant, a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Festuca arundinacea subsp. orientalis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from digestive issues. Festuca arundinacea subsp. orientalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
